# Quality Primitive Templates

These are path-safe, copyable templates for adopting the AI coding quality kit
one primitive at a time. Each file is one adoption primitive you can copy into a
new repository and edit. Start with `issue-contract.md` for a first safe issue,
then add the others as your team is ready.

Every template uses `<placeholder>` markers instead of machine-local paths, so
they stay portable across repositories.

- [Issue contract](issue-contract.md)
- [Agent instructions](agent-instructions.md)
- [Local CI gate](local-ci-gate.md)
- [Evidence timeline](evidence-timeline.md)
- [Trust posture](trust-posture.md)
- [Operator actions](operator-actions.md)
